meaning: n.鏁欏瓙,鍚嶄箟涓婄殑鍎垮瓙
examples: Even today, god parents will often give shoes to their godchild on this occasion.
One of these is Lyralei, master archer of the wood, and favored godchild of the wind.
Women don't have a push-and-go as strong as men, most of who prefer a life to assist and godchild.
Want to give a small investment to your godchild?
